data.name: How to Fix the Future: Book One
data.detailed_description:
About the game

Step into the shoes of a young man trapped in the grind of an ordinary life. By day, he’s stuck in a dead-end retail job; by night, he escapes into video games to drown out the monotony of his existence. Life hasn’t been kind or fair to him, but everything changes when mysterious game disks begin appearing around the globe. When two enigmatic agents from the future arrive, he’s thrust into a web of intrigue and high-stakes conflicts far beyond his wildest dreams. What seemed like a mundane life now spirals into the greatest adventure he could ever imagine, a journey that will redefine his destiny. Your destiny.

Unravel the secrets of time itself as you forge new bonds, navigate complex circumstances, and make choices that carry profound weight. Each decision you make ripples through the fabric of time, shaping not just your fate but the course of history itself. Will you rise to the challenge or be swept away by the tides of fate?

How to Fix the Future is a gripping, story-driven sci-fi visual novel. Spanning the present, a dystopian post-apocaliptic future and the past, this tale weaves together mystery, lust, romance, and high-stakes adventure, where every choice crafts a unique path through a world on the brink of transformation.

Features

  • More than 7000 Full-HD renders.

  • More than 250 Full-HD animations.

  • 4 cinematics.

  • More than 130 music tracks.

  • 108 sound effects.

  • More than 30 lewd scenes(all optional, tailored to your preferences).

  • A wide range of fetishes, fully customizable.

  • Unlockable special renders. Explore different paths to collect them all.

  • Scene replay gallery for all sex scenes and special renders gallery.

  • Branching storylines and romance options with meaningful choices that define your personality.

  • Small, flavorful choices that add charm and replayability.

  • A mix of sharp comedy, heartfelt drama, and mind-bending sci-fi.

Hot content & fetishes

In your journey, you can expect a massive amount of hot content. Both traditional sexual encounters and more niche, specialized fetishes(mostly BDSM). All of them are optional! You decide which ones to unlock and which to skip, putting the choice entirely in your hands. Here's the list of what you may find in How to Fix the Future:

  • Masturbation\Handjob\Petting

  • Oral sex (Blowjob\Cunnilingus)

  • Vaginal sex

  • Anal sex

  • Boobjob

  • Footjob

  • Toys

  • BDSM (femdom, maledom).

  • Foot fetish

  • Olfactophilia

  • Spanking

  • Watersports (Squirt, Piss)

  • Tease & Denial

  • Humiliation

  • Ballbusting

  • Sounding

  • Chastity

  • Cum-eating and cumplay

  • LGBTQ+ content

  • Futa\Trans content

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 希臘文, 簡體中文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
